description: I'm in the experimentation phase. But I'm enjoying it too much.
author: Riva C.
pros: Easy to use, integrates other tools and intuitive
cons: I'm in the experimentation phase. But I'm enjoying it too much.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great product and wonderful service support.
description: The software has allowed us to centrally manage our decentralised recruitment process and has significantly reduced our recruitment timeframes. Additionally, the performance module provides an easy and intuitive platform for our staff to capture and record ongoing performance conversations. The reporting functionality also provides easy to access and build reports to demonstrate compliance of all of our staff.
author: Sean C.
pros: A really intuitive system that allows end users a central location to manage their performance conversations, learning and development activities and recruitment all in one place. Staff in our organisation often comment on how easy the processes are to follow and how simple it is to capture and record ongoing performance discussions.
cons: The only part of the system that sometimes causes us issues is that the hierarchy in PeopleStreme has a person to person relationship whereas our other hierarchy based systems are position to position.

author: Erika B.
pros: Easy functionality. Does what want it to do. The support team is fantastic. and offer a lot of support when needed.
cons: We could do with better reporting functionality (however this is available and is a matter of us upgrading).

review_title: Ascender Payroll - sound and proven payroll for complex configuration and requirements
author: Sheralyn S.
pros: Our current Account Executive is great, always ready to help and is easily at hand whenever we have any queries or issues. She is very professional and provides a level of assurance over working with Ascender. We have used Ascender Pay for around 30 years since it was first released and find it suits our complex enterprise agreement requirements. There is an abundance of new functionality being released for review and implementation. Ascender is a big part of my life and I am very attached since my connection goes back some 23 years. I almost feel part of their family working with some of the long-term staff for such a time – they are just wonderful people.
cons: With all the new functionality being released it is hard to keep up.

description: After having worked manually and also with other slow response programs, this one has been extraordinary, efficient, fast and saves me more time for other commercial activities
author: Elias S.
pros: Friendly, versatile and easy to connect with other software
cons: really so far I have not gotten anything that tells me that I do not like this or that, rather it has been very useful

description: Excellent working relationship wirh many people inside of Ascender at all levels.
author: Steve C.
pros: Very suited to a university environment and has been for many decades. HES has had a relationship with Ascender and it's predecesor companies since 1997. We continue to strengthen the relationship through collaborative software development and broader services to the universities we serve.
cons: It is (understandably) difficut to configure since it is a complex payroll.

description: Now that we have been through a performance review cycle, the benefits are apparent to everyone, Managers can see how powerful it can be and they want to use it! We now have plans that are truly tailored to each individual and everyone's KPI's actually link back to our Company Strategic objectives. There is greater clarity for all about their futures and were their development is headed. There is greater engagement in general across the board. We also like to ability to be able to add relevant additional modules as we like as we evolve.
author: Ann S.
pros: Its has allowed us to adopt some of the latest HR strategies in this area by replacing our paper based performance appraisal process, providing alignment with our company strategy and improved employee engagement and development. Ease of use is also key. It also provides an easy to use tool to for all our Learning and Development which ties back into our Personal development plans and is constantly being referred to and worked on via the 1 on 1's. We were never good at this in the past. After sales support has been excellent as you are proactively contacted to ensure you are getting the most from the software.
cons: Some of the data entry is into windows (rather than into a field ) which when they open are too big and take up most of the screen

author: Felicity M.
pros: PeopleStreme's recruitment module enabled CEA to move away from manual recruitment processes and manage a very high recruitment workload for the last few years. The support we received from representative and the Helpdesk was excellent.
cons: The version we used meant that at times, it seemed there were too many tabs to click through to get to the information we wanted, however, it was not something that seriously impeded the way we worked.

review_title: One platform for all our HR initiatives to be housed making it easy and straight for our staff.
description: It's a great tool to engage our staff in our HR initiatives. The platform allows our processes to be uniformed and create a professional environment for all things people/HR.
author: Laura S.
pros: - One platform for all our HR initiatives - It is easy and straight forward to use - We can add new modules at the time that suits our organisation - Easily monitor completion rates etc. - Ability to export data into excel in a friendly way - Friendly helpdesk if support is required - Engages team well - Ability to have single sign on
cons: - Fixed structure so can be difficult to make bespoke for our business when required - Can take time to set up new modules

author: Laure S.
pros: The modules are user friendly and intuitive.
cons: The control panel was a little harder to navigate and to understand where and how certain areas/fields could be customised. Upgrades could also be improved with some customisation getting reset.

review_title: A great tool that allows HR processes to occur electronically
description: Real time data and eliminates manual paperwork
author: Kim L.
pros: - Easy to use - Accessible from anywhere - Accountability and monitoring of goals are linked together
cons: This system is great but our business is slightly unique and require some customizations which will come at a cost. This will improve over time with system upgrades.

review_title: Our experience has been great, training was excellent and we love the application suite.
author: Christine W.
pros: User Friendly/Intuitive and easy to use. Many modules to choose from going forward that we can grow with that enables us to have access to the entire Human Capital Management ecosystem in one place.
cons: Nothing, other than we wish they had more US based support. Initially we thought we had a lot of bugs, but as it turned out it was more just administrative user error. Orchestrating feedback from technical support 12 hours apart was sometimes difficult to answer things quickly.

description: PeopleStreme has proven to be very easy to use. The staff has been able to work out the functionality for themselves after one quick training session. Feedback has been very positive.
author: Stephanie C.
pros: Easy to use
cons: Software seems fine. Well, developer and mature so no bugs have been encountered.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have worked with this in the past and we ended up upgrading for more options.
author: Dana M.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our Customer Success Manager has been a fantastic support for us along this journey. He is very knowledgeable and happy to help in any way. It took us some time to implement due to the project being managed by only one person - but this goes to show that it is a truly scalable solution for large and smaller businesses. We will soon implement the Learning & Development Module across our teams and know it will lift our training and personal development to a new level with this professional and well-structured solution.
author: Natasha B.
pros: Peoplestreme is customisable and is very 'follow your nose' in terms of employee and manager use. Dashboards are great to easy report on individuals, teams and also for compliance requirements. For a business which did not have anything in place previously it has helped is to implement a performance management program which is best of breed and best practice.
cons: There were a couple of items with our version which meant we needed some manual workarounds but with our upgraded version ready to go live next month everything will be resolved.

review_title: System lacks basic Functionality & Oversold Product
description: Overall, my recommendation is to avoid this product, it is not worth the increased administrative burden that the modules come with. The product is expensive for the lack of functionality and the presentation of the modules.
author: Danielle R.
pros: Performance Management Module is only Module I would recommend purchasing.
cons: Customer Service: -Disconnect from the sales team and product delivery team -Sales team over sale PeopleSteme Modules that doesn't save time but increases administrative tasks -Product team provides workarounds to compensate for the lack of the system functionality once you have purchased the modules - PeopleStreme can't commit to timeframes for the companies 'road map' on new features System: -There is minimal automation provided by the purchased modules -System is extremely slow -Inability to bulk upload all historical data (e.g. Job Ads, Position Descriptions, Resumes) -Purchased modules don’t communicate to one another, requiring a increased workload for the HR team -There is no Employee Landing page that displays basic employee data (hire date, department, job title), which is collected from the Onboarding process. Sales team now tells us that this is only available to them because of their access permissions and not part of the package sold -Onboarding Module does not allow for cross-boarding to be captured in PeopleStreme
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Extremely disappointing product, promised the world and delivered very little.
description: Extremely poor. Leaves a bitter taste in the mouth.
author: Adam B.
pros: We can use the payroll function, but only because we have invested heavily in the rollout. There is little point rolling our the rest of the suite of products we purchased as just after we signed the contract, they were bought out by Ceridian who did not intend to continue their product offering further than 18 months.
cons: Having to continually correct the mistakes made in payroll outsourcing through Ascender. The fact that as soon as we signed up for the product, the company was sold which meant that the products we were investing in would not be supported and developed after our initial contract term.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software is easy to use and more affordable than others on the market. The system allows you to easily find a candidate using the search function and has saved our company thousands in recruiter fees as a result. As adverts are directly uploaded to SEEK and our website the software has saved me time. In addition, the ability to mass (personalised) respond to candidates has saved me time and ensured a better candidate experience with our organisation.
cons: The software does not imped itself into our website to suit our style guide. It clearly looks like it has been added, rather than matching the rest of our webpage.

review_title: Great cloud based application that manages the whole employee life-cycle for us.
description: Streamlined employee on-boarding and administration, greater understanding of employee performance and a platform to manage learning & development, as well as remuneration reviews more effectively
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Whilst the application is module based, all data is interconnected so that you can build a full view of your employees as individuals as well as a collective.
cons: A few more system configuration options as the system administrator would be useful, particularly when trying to build or customise reports.

author: Emre Ç.
pros: You can choose if you want to improve your skills, it does not take much time to learn thanks to its simple interface, it is easy to use.
cons: I didn't have a bad experience because customer service is always able to solve problems.

review_title: eRecruitment - Effective, streamlined recruitment process, Peoplestreme supportive, responsive
description: Highly positive relationship developed with Peoplestreme. Useful tool in the management of high volume recruitment. Database functions highly useful and efficient for management reporting. Intuitive software, easy to follow and matches our company processes well. This is one of the reasons why we selected this module for our company. We have been impressed with the level of customer service and promptness in delivery of troubleshooting.
author: Anne T.
pros: Easy to use, intuitive software that enables recruitment to work in line with our internal company processes. Highly responsive troubleshooting. Punctual support when needed.
cons: System inability to identify same candidate twice. Candidates that apply for multiple roles within company cannot be easily identified under search. Candidates within system are not easily identifiable as they are assigned by number not name.

description: Staff engagement and management of performance and development.
author: Laura E.
pros: It's intuitive, adds value to the employee life cycle and engaging. The performance management module is streamlined and encourages ongoing conversations between the manager and employee. The software also promotes individuals managing their own performance management and development in a transparent approach. Reporting is extremely easy to use and read with the back end having the ability to push workflows and emails to outstanding items. PeopleStreme are extremely responsive to our queries and issues.
cons: That you can't be logged in more then once because as an administrator it would be useful to have several screens open at a time. Would also prefer the software not to time out and require relogin.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use and value for money
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Peoplestreme is quite intuitive and a simple to use system as a user. Our customer manager is approachable, knowledgeable and friendly and the helpdesk understanding, responsive and know their product!
cons: The backend doesn't seem to be as intuitive as the front end, however the support from the helpdesk etc made up for this.

review_title: I used PeopleStreme software in a previous role for over 9 years
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: * Easy to use * First class customer service * The complete employee lifecycle is available in this system with add in modules as required which provides flexibility dependent on requirements. * Regular updates and amendments to keep the system agile.

review_title: Great value for money, easy to use system - with the option to add modules over time..
author: Helen C.
pros: - Easy to use as both an administrator & end user - Simplifies the recruitment process end to end. For us it has improved compliance & cost cost management significantly - Online onboarding - esignature approval is great feature!
cons: - It can be costly to make custom changes to the platform post implementation - At some points the process the system could be more intuitive, we have overcome this with training and support
